message: Revamp UI to iMessage-style, grouping & auth  Major UI and frontend refactor: redesigned styles and layout to an iMessage-inspired look (desktop + mobile), added an auth overlay (login/register), settings modal with color swatches, and a responsive sidebar with mobile toggle. chat.js updated with mobile detection, sidebar behavior, improved auth flow (trim inputs, update UI on login/register/logout), channel selection handling, and a new iMessage-style message grouping system (parseMessage, grouping debounce, finalizeGroups, timestamp dividers, sender labels and sound handling). Index template updated to match the new structure and markup. Chat room logs were trimmed/updated and a new updates/style.md was added; users.json also updated.
